org.arakhne.neteditor.fig

Interface PropertyNames

  • All Superinterfaces:
    PropertyNames, Serializable

    public interface PropertyNames
extends PropertyNames
    Provides standard property names.
    Version:
    17.0 2013-10-23 21:03:01
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND
